name: Hoodwink
description: Who said you could stroll in my woods? Hoodwink Fires an acorn attack on the unit-targeted enemy. The acorn bounces to nearby targets, slowing them and dealing a percentage of Hoodwink's attack with bonus damage.

abilities.name: Mistwoods Wayfarer
abilities.description: The higher Hoodwink's level, the greater the incoming attack redirect proc chance.

abilities.name: Acorn Shot
abilities.description: Fires an acorn attack on the unit-targeted enemy. The acorn bounces to nearby targets, slowing them and dealing a percentage of Hoodwink's attack with bonus damage.

abilities.name: Bushwhack
abilities.description: Tosses a net trap that stuns enemy heroes if they are near a tree in the area-targeted location. Applies damage over time to all debuff-affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Scurry
abilities.description: When activated, Hoodwink gains bonus movement speed, evasion, attack and cast range, phased movement, and tree-walking for a brief time.

abilities.name: Decoy
abilities.description: If the Decoy-based illusion is attacked or hit by a unit-targeted ability, it is destroyed and throws a lesser Bushwhack toward the enemy. Requires acquiring in order for the to channel Sharpshooter, else the illusion runs toward the nearest enemy unit.

abilities.name: Hunter's Boomerang
abilities.description: Tosses a boomerang in an arc that deals damage as it pass through enemy units. The Hunter's mark applied slows the affected enemy units' movement speed and be more vulnerable to spell damage. The boomerang then returns to Hoodwink at the tip of the arc.

abilities.name: Sharpshooter
abilities.description: The bolt flies through creeps and damages them, albeit the damage being less effective. Increases the bolt projectile speed and the movement speed slow applied.
